goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'aylesbray lodge guest house'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '1 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'friday'.
If the booking fails how about 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'la raza'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '16:45' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called aylesbray lodge guest house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 3 nights starting from friday
If the booking fails how about saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called la raza
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 16:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
